preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM heph_unit WHERE id IN (1, 2)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM heph_person WHERE id IN (100, 101)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_config_definition WHERE config_group = 'main-system'

column.name: help_text
column.value: 配置保存后对新登录会话生效，单位：分钟。

column.name: help_text
column.value: 开启后登录页使用公钥加密密码，后端使用私钥解密。

column.name: help_text
column.value: PEM 或 Base64 X.509 公钥，可公开下发给登录页。

column.name: help_text
column.value: PEM 或 Base64 PKCS8 私钥，仅服务端解密使用，不会通过公开接口返回。

column.name: default_value
column.value: 登录后继续使用智能对话与组织配置能力

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_config_definition WHERE config_code = 'login.mouse.trail.effect'

column.name: options_json
column.value: [{"label":"乐符拖尾","value":"music"},{"label":"飘动线条","value":"flowing-lines"},{"label":"绚丽流星","value":"meteor"},{"label":"大波浪","value":"wave"},{"label":"鼠标涂鸦","value":"doodle"},{"label":"连线点阵","value":"constellation"},{"label":"萤火之光","value":"firefly"},{"label":"多彩烟花","value":"firework"},{"label":"放大镜","value":"magnifier"}]

column.name: help_text
column.value: 控制登录页鼠标拖尾效果，配置保存后刷新登录页生效。

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_config_definition WHERE config_code = 'login.page.background.media-id'

column.name: help_text
column.value: 登录页背景图 media_id，默认读取 media_id = 1 的图片。

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_config_definition WHERE config_code = 'login.page.background.grid.enabled'

column.name: help_text
column.value: 开启后在登录页背景图上叠加白色霓虹网格效果，不影响背景图 media_id。

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_config_definition WHERE config_code = 'login.session.single-login.enabled'

column.name: help_text
column.value: 开启后，同一账号新登录成功时会清理该账号的其他旧会话；默认关闭，允许多处同时登录。

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_group = 'general' AND permission_section = 'person'

column.name: help_text
column.value: 前后端使用同一个加密模式配置；选择 RSA_PKCS1 时登录页使用兼容加密工具，选择 RSA_OAEP_SHA256 时浏览器需 HTTPS 安全上下文。

column.name: help_text
column.value: 兼容历史配置，默认由加密模式自动映射，一般无需修改。

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM heph_role WHERE role_code = 'system_admin'

column.name: unit_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM heph_unit ORDER BY parent_id, sort_order, id LIMIT 1)

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO heph_role_type (type_code, type_name, admin_flag, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'normal', '普通岗位', 0, 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_role_type WHERE type_code = 'normal')
INSERT INTO heph_role_type (type_code, type_name, admin_flag, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'admin', '管理员', 1, 20, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_role_type WHERE type_code = 'admin')
INSERT INTO heph_role_type (type_code, type_name, admin_flag, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'operator', '业务岗', 0, 30, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_role_type WHERE type_code = 'operator')
INSERT INTO heph_role_type (type_code, type_name, admin_flag, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'support', '支撑岗', 0, 40, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_role_type WHERE type_code = 'support')

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.person', '常规-人员', 'general', 'person', 1, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.person' )

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.unit', '常规-部门', 'general', 'unit', 1, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.unit' )

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.unit.view', '常规-部门-查看', 'general', 'unit', 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.unit.view')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.unit.create', '常规-部门-新增', 'general', 'unit', 20, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.unit.create')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.unit.update', '常规-部门-修改', 'general', 'unit', 30, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.unit.update')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.unit.delete', '常规-部门-删除', 'general', 'unit', 40, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.unit.delete')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.role', '常规-岗位', 'general', 'role', 1, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.role')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.role.view', '常规-岗位-查看', 'general', 'role', 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.role.view')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.role.create', '常规-岗位-新增', 'general', 'role', 20, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.role.create')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.role.update', '常规-岗位-修改', 'general', 'role', 30, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.role.update')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.role.delete', '常规-岗位-删除', 'general', 'role', 40, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.role.delete')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.role.person.assign', '常规-岗位-分配人员', 'general', 'role', 50, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.role.person.assign')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.role.permission.refresh', '常规-岗位-刷新权限', 'general', 'role', 60, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.role.permission.refresh')

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config', '常规-配置', 'general', 'config', 1, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config.view', '常规-配置-查看', 'general', 'config', 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config.view')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config.update', '常规-配置-修改', 'general', 'config', 20, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config.update')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.log', '常规-日志', 'general', 'log', 1, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.log')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.log.view', '常规-日志-查看', 'general', 'log', 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.log.view')

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO heph_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, permission_code) SELECT r.id, p.id, p.permission_code FROM heph_role r JOIN heph_permission p ON p.enabled = 1 WHERE r.role_code = 'system_admin' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM heph_role_permission rp WHERE rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.permission_id = p.id )

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO heph_person_role (person_id, role_id) SELECT p.id, r.id FROM heph_person p JOIN heph_role r ON r.role_code = 'system_admin' WHERE p.id = 100 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM heph_person_role pr WHERE pr.person_id = p.id AND pr.role_id = r.id )

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config.login', '常规-系统登录', 'general', 'config-login', 1, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config.login')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config.login.view', '常规-系统登录-查看', 'general', 'config-login', 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config.login.view')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config.login.update', '常规-系统登录-修改', 'general', 'config-login', 20, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config.login.update')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config.login-page', '常规-登录页面', 'general', 'config-login-page', 2, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config.login-page')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config.login-page.view', '常规-登录页面-查看', 'general', 'config-login-page', 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config.login-page.view')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.config.login-page.update', '常规-登录页面-修改', 'general', 'config-login-page', 20, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.config.login-page.update')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.log.login', '常规-登录日志', 'general', 'log-login', 1, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.log.login')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.log.login.view', '常规-登录日志-查看', 'general', 'log-login', 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.log.login.view')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.log.operation', '常规-操作日志', 'general', 'log-operation', 2, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.log.operation')

INSERT INTO heph_permission (permission_code, permission_name, permission_group, permission_section, sort_order, enabled) SELECT 'general.log.operation.view', '常规-操作日志-查看', 'general', 'log-operation', 10, 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM heph_permission WHERE permission_code = 'general.log.operation.view')

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO heph_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, permission_code) SELECT r.id, p.id, p.permission_code FROM heph_role r JOIN heph_permission p ON p.enabled = 1 WHERE r.role_code = 'system_admin' AND p.permission_code IN ( 'general.config.login', 'general.config.login.view', 'general.config.login.update', 'general.config.login-page', 'general.config.login-page.view', 'general.config.login-page.update', 'general.log.login', 'general.log.login.view', 'general.log.operation', 'general.log.operation.view' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM heph_role_permission rp WHERE rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.permission_id = p.id )

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE heph_permission SET enabled = 0 WHERE permission_code IN ( 'general.config', 'general.config.view', 'general.config.update', 'general.log', 'general.log.view' )

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE heph_permission SET enabled = 1 WHERE permission_code IN ('general.config', 'general.log')
